title: Smoky Roasted Shandong Seitan Skewers
description: Savory, chewy seitan skewers glazed with a smoky soymiso sauce and caramelized vegan Mars bar, grilled to a perfect char for a Shandonginspired adventure.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium‑high heat.
In a bowl, whisk together soy sauce, tahini, maple syrup, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and water to form a glaze.
Thread seitan pieces and Mars bar strips onto the soaked bamboo skewers, alternating as desired.
Brush each skewer generously with the glaze, reserving a little for the final finish.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook, turning every 2–3 minutes, until all sides are charred and the glaze has caramelized, about 8–10 minutes.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, brush the remaining glaze over the skewers for a glossy finish.
Remove from the grill and let rest for 2 minutes.
Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds and serve hot with a side of steamed rice or a fresh green salad.
Enjoy the smoky, chewy, and slightly sweet twist on Shandong-style skewers.
